title: dalea macrotropis
intro: Dalea macrotropis, also known as the pink or purple flowered prairie rose or butterfly pea, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dalea macrotropis include reducing fever and pain, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Dalea macrotropis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
